_comment: Publishers/platforms TU Delft has consortial or subscription access to, based on the VSNU/UKB national licences most Dutch universities including TU Delft participate in. This list is a best-effort starting point, not an authoritative source -- verify specific titles via the TU Delft Library search (https://www.tudelft.nl/library) and edit this file as needed.
publishers: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers
